name: SREDNOFF OS design and growth source registry

sources.name: 21st.dev
sources.license: varies by component; verify at source before copying
sources.provenance: external component marketplace via Magic/21st.dev; inspect source page and dependency tree before adoption
sources.copy_policy: copy-adapt-upgrade only after license, provenance, accessibility, dependency, and visual QA checks

sources.name: shadcn/ui registry
sources.license: MIT for shadcn/ui source; verify third-party registry item license before copying
sources.provenance: official shadcn/ui registry documentation and registry item metadata
sources.copy_policy: prefer stack-native registry items; adapt locally and keep provenance note for copied code

sources.name: Magic UI
sources.provenance: external animated component documentation; inspect component source and package requirements
sources.copy_policy: adapt effects selectively; avoid copying if license or dependency cost is unclear

sources.name: Aceternity UI
sources.provenance: external component documentation; inspect source, animation dependencies, and usage terms
sources.copy_policy: copy only with confirmed license; prefer pattern extraction for visual effects

sources.name: Origin UI
sources.provenance: external component library; inspect component page and any linked repository before reuse
sources.copy_policy: prefer simple patterns; keep copied code minimal and project-native

sources.name: React Bits
sources.provenance: external animated React component source; inspect animation/runtime dependencies
sources.copy_policy: copy only small effects with confirmed license and measured performance budget

sources.name: Figma
sources.license: user-provided file rights; do not copy third-party assets without user rights
sources.provenance: Figma connector or user-provided design file; preserve source file reference
sources.copy_policy: use as design specification; export/copy assets only when user rights are explicit

sources.name: Canva
sources.license: user-provided file rights; Canva asset terms may vary
sources.provenance: Canva connector or user-provided creative; preserve source design reference
sources.copy_policy: use for approved marketing assets; verify rights before export or reuse

sources.name: Three.js
sources.copy_policy: use official APIs and examples as patterns; verify example asset licenses separately

sources.name: React Three Fiber
sources.provenance: official pmndrs React Three Fiber documentation
sources.copy_policy: use when project is React-based; prefer idiomatic hooks/components and profile runtime cost

sources.name: model-viewer
sources.copy_policy: prefer for simple glTF/AR display; validate model size, accessibility fallback, and browser support

sources.name: Babylon.js
sources.copy_policy: use for complex 3D scenes; verify bundle impact and choose over Three.js only when feature fit is stronger

sources.name: glTF Transform
sources.provenance: official glTF Transform documentation and CLI/API project
sources.copy_policy: use for optimization pipelines; record compression settings and validate output visually

sources.name: Khronos glTF Sample Assets
sources.license: varies by asset; verify asset license before copying
sources.provenance: KhronosGroup glTF sample assets repository; inspect per-asset license metadata
sources.copy_policy: use mainly for tests/fixtures; do not ship without per-asset license confirmation

sources.name: Poly Haven
sources.provenance: Poly Haven asset library; keep asset URL and downloaded asset metadata
sources.copy_policy: prefer CC0 HDRI/textures; still record asset URL, file size, and performance budget

sources.name: ambientCG
sources.provenance: ambientCG material library; keep asset URL and chosen texture resolution
sources.copy_policy: prefer CC0 PBR materials; cap texture resolution to project performance budget

sources.name: Sketchfab
sources.license: varies by asset; verify per-download license before copying
sources.provenance: Sketchfab marketplace asset page; record author, asset URL, license, and download date
sources.copy_policy: do not copy automatically; require explicit user approval plus license, attribution, size, and security review
